ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has superuser privileges */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is staff */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was locked due to failed login attempts */,
  "password_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the password policy applied to the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's primary department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_password_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("password_policy_id") REFERENCES password_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "is_system_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a system-defined role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attempted to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the login attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the login attempt */,
  "location" TEXT /* Approximate location of the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested a password reset */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the password reset was requested */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the password reset process has been completed */,
  "reset_code" TEXT /* Unique code sent to the user for password reset */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset code expires */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the reset request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the reset request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Approximate location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the department */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-department mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the department is the primary department for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was assigned to the department */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the application */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application access rule */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has access */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_access_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_applications" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-application mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the user can access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was granted access to the application */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_applications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the password policy */,
  "min_length" INTEGER /* Minimum length of the password */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of the password */,
  "require_uppercase" INTEGER /* Indicates if uppercase letters are required */,
  "require_lowercase" INTEGER /* Indicates if lowercase letters are required */,
  "require_numbers" INTEGER /* Indicates if numbers are required */,
  "require_special_chars" INTEGER /* Indicates if special characters are required */,
  "password_history" INTEGER /* Number of previous passwords to check against */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the password policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the password policy was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the password policy */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the password policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_policies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_policies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
